_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 late afternoon. 6 medical specialty domain-projections: dermatology, ophthalmology, gastroenterology, hematology, sports medicine, pain medicine. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
dermatology_through_tig: Dermatology is operator-medicine of skin; the body's largest organ and operator-LATTICE-of-protection.
Skin layers are operator-LATTICE: epidermis (outer barrier) dermis (collagen connective) hypodermis (fat insulation).
Pigmentation is operator-melanin-distribution; melanocytes produce eumelanin and pheomelanin determining HARMONY of skin tone.
Melanoma is operator-CANCER-of-melanocytes; aggressive metastatic if not caught early, ABCDE rule (asymmetry border color diameter evolution).
Eczema (atopic dermatitis) is operator-INFLAMMATORY-LATTICE; itch barrier dysfunction immune dysregulation creates chronic CHAOS.
Psoriasis is operator-AUTOIMMUNE-PROLIFERATION; T-cell mediated rapid keratinocyte turnover, plaques scales joint involvement.
Acne is operator-FOLLICULAR-COLLAPSE; sebum dead cells bacteria (P. acnes) inflammation produce comedones papules pustules.
Sun damage is operator-UV-DNA-DAMAGE; cumulative photons drive premature aging plus melanoma SCC BCC risk.
Skin biopsy is operator-DIAGNOSTIC-SAMPLE; punch shave excisional, histology determines benign vs malignant LATTICE.
Dermatitis is operator-INFLAMMATORY-CATCH-ALL; contact atopic seborrheic stasis each have distinct trigger and pattern.
Mole (nevus) is operator-MELANOCYTE-CLUSTER; congenital or acquired, monitor for change indicating possible melanoma transformation.
ophthalmology_through_tig: Ophthalmology is operator-medicine of eye and visual system; from cornea to optic nerve to visual cortex.
Cornea is operator-PRIMARY-REFRACTOR; transparent dome at front contributes 2/3 of total refractive power.
Lens is operator-FINE-FOCUS-ADJUSTOR; crystalline disc behind iris changes shape to focus near vs far (accommodation).
Retina is operator-PHOTORECEPTIVE-LATTICE at back of eye; rods and cones convert photons to neural signals.
Refractive error is operator-FOCUS-MISMATCH; myopia (near-sighted) hyperopia (far-sighted) astigmatism (irregular cornea).
Glaucoma is operator-OPTIC-NERVE-COLLAPSE from elevated intraocular pressure; gradual peripheral vision loss treatable but irreversible.
Cataract is operator-LENS-OPACITY; protein aggregation cloudiness, surgical extraction with intraocular lens replacement standard.
Macular degeneration is operator-CENTRAL-VISION-COLLAPSE; age-related dry (drusen atrophy) or wet (neovascularization) forms.
Diabetic retinopathy is operator-MICROVASCULAR-DAMAGE; chronic hyperglycemia damages retinal capillaries, leakage proliferation.
Intraocular pressure is operator-AQUEOUS-HUMOR-PRESSURE; normal ~10-21 mmHg, elevated indicates glaucoma risk.
Visual field is operator-LATTICE-of-vision-extent; tested via perimetry to detect glaucoma stroke retinal disease.
gastroenterology_through_tig: Gastroenterology is operator-medicine of digestive system; from mouth to anus plus liver gallbladder pancreas.
Peristalsis is operator-PROGRESS-of-food-through-GI-tract; coordinated muscular wave moves bolus distally.
GI tract is operator-LATTICE: mouth esophagus stomach small intestine (duodenum jejunum ileum) large intestine (cecum colon rectum) anus.
Microbiome is operator-LATTICE-of-resident-microbes; trillions of bacteria archaea fungi participate in digestion immunity.
Ulcer (peptic) is operator-MUCOSAL-BREAK in stomach or duodenum; H. pylori infection NSAID damage primary causes.
IBS is operator-FUNCTIONAL-DISORDER; abdominal pain altered bowel habits without structural disease, bidirectional gut-brain.
IBD is operator-CHRONIC-INFLAMMATORY; Crohn (any GI segment skip lesions full-thickness) ulcerative colitis (colon continuous mucosal).
Hepatitis is operator-LIVER-INFLAMMATION; viral (A B C D E) autoimmune alcoholic drug-induced fatty liver each have distinct mechanism.
Cirrhosis is operator-LIVER-FIBROSIS-COLLAPSE; chronic damage replaced by scar tissue, irreversible hepatocellular dysfunction.
Endoscopy is operator-INTERNAL-VISUALIZATION; flexible scope with camera EGD colonoscopy ERCP enable diagnosis and intervention.
Gallbladder is operator-BILE-RESERVOIR; concentrates and stores bile from liver, releases via common bile duct on cholecystokinin signal.
hematology_through_tig: Hematology is operator-medicine of blood; cellular components plus plasma plus bone marrow LATTICE.
Red blood cells are operator-OXYGEN-CARRIERS; biconcave disc lacking nucleus, hemoglobin packed inside, lifespan ~120 days.
White blood cells are operator-IMMUNE-LATTICE; neutrophils lymphocytes monocytes eosinophils basophils each specialize.
Platelets are operator-CLOT-INITIATORS; cell fragments from megakaryocytes, adhere aggregate plug at vascular injury sites.
Hemoglobin is operator-OXYGEN-BINDING-PROTEIN in RBCs; alpha2 beta2 tetramer with iron-heme groups, cooperative binding HARMONY.
Anemia is operator-LOW-RBC-HEMOGLOBIN; microcytic (iron deficiency) macrocytic (B12 folate) normocytic (chronic disease) categories.
Leukemia is operator-CANCER-of-leukocytes; acute myeloid lymphoid plus chronic myeloid lymphoid each distinct.
Lymphoma is operator-CANCER-of-lymphocytes-in-tissues; Hodgkin (Reed-Sternberg cells) versus non-Hodgkin (B-cell or T-cell).
Bone marrow is operator-PRODUCTION-CENTER for blood cells; biopsy from iliac crest assesses cellularity and dysplasia.
Hemostasis is operator-BLEEDING-CONTROL; primary (platelet plug) secondary (coagulation cascade fibrin) tertiary (fibrinolysis).
Coagulation cascade is operator-LATTICE-of-clotting-factors; intrinsic (XII XI IX VIII) extrinsic (VII tissue factor) common (X V II I) pathways.
sports_medicine_through_tig: Sports medicine is operator-medicine-applied-to-physical-activity; injury prevention treatment performance optimization.
Kinesiology is operator-STUDY-OF-MOVEMENT; biomechanics motor control exercise physiology integrate.
Sports injury is operator-TISSUE-DAMAGE from physical activity; acute (sprain strain fracture) versus overuse (tendinopathy stress fracture).
Rehabilitation is operator-FUNCTION-RESTORATION-LATTICE; physical therapy progressive loading return-to-sport phase HARMONY.
Biomechanics applies operator-MECHANICS-TO-MOVEMENT; ground reaction forces joint torques muscle activation patterns.
Exercise physiology is operator-BODY-ADAPTATION-TO-LOAD; cardiorespiratory neuromuscular metabolic responses to training BREATH.
Strength training is operator-PROGRESSIVE-OVERLOAD; muscle hypertrophy strength endurance via resistance.
Cardiovascular fitness is operator-OXYGEN-DELIVERY-CAPACITY; VO2max measure of aerobic LATTICE.
Recovery is operator-RESTORATION-PROCESS; rest sleep nutrition (protein) active modalities (massage compression) reduce CHAOS-fatigue.
Athletic performance is operator-OUTPUT-OPTIMIZATION; physical preparation skill technique tactics psychology integrated.
Doping is operator-PERFORMANCE-ENHANCEMENT-CHAOS; banned substances and methods (anabolic steroids EPO blood doping).
pain_medicine_through_tig: Pain medicine is operator-medicine-of-pain; acute and chronic pain across all body systems.
Nociception is operator-DETECTION-OF-NOXIOUS-STIMULUS; specialized receptors signal tissue damage to CNS.
Neuropathic pain is operator-NERVE-INJURY-PAIN; diabetic neuropathy postherpetic CRPS distinct from inflammatory.
Chronic pain is operator-PAIN-BEYOND-HEALING; persists greater than 3 months, requires interdisciplinary HARMONY-treatment.
Acute pain is operator-IMMEDIATE-INJURY-PAIN; rapid onset short duration treats with NSAIDs or opioids depending on severity.
Opioid is operator-MU-RECEPTOR-AGONIST; morphine codeine oxycodone fentanyl strong analgesic plus respiratory depression risk.
NSAID is operator-COX-INHIBITOR; ibuprofen naproxen aspirin reduce prostaglandin-mediated inflammation and pain.
Multimodal analgesia is operator-LATTICE-OF-COMBINED-MODALITIES; pharmacological physical psychological for enhanced effect with reduced single-agent toxicity.
Pain pathway is operator-LATTICE: nociceptor -> spinal cord (dorsal horn) -> spinothalamic tract -> thalamus -> somatosensory cortex.
Gate control theory: operator-MODULATION-AT-SPINAL-CORD; non-painful afferents close gate reducing pain transmission (Melzack Wall 1965).
Biopsychosocial model is operator-INTEGRATED-VIEW; pain involves biological psychological social factors, all addressed for HARMONY-treatment.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 126 domains across natural sciences mathematics computer science engineering social sciences humanities philosophy clinical medicine applied design pure mathematics meta-mathematics CS depth Eastern philosophy historical disciplines and medical specialties.
The lens is genuinely universal; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection.
